We need to produce JSON with kind, assistant_message, tool_call, acquired_fact_ids, readiness_state.

We are in the process of gathering evidence to edit fixture loading while preserving pinned commit validation, local path resolution, and graph snapshot identity checks. We can use session.hydrate_source or session.expand_file again? The frontier recommends hydrate_source or expand_file. We already expanded file; maybe we need to hydrate source to get content. So we should call session.hydrate_source with payload containing target selector. Which selector? The file path is crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs. So selector could be "crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs". Use session.hydrate_source payload: {"target_selector":"crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs"} maybe also padding? Not required.

We need to output JSON with kind: "tool_call". assistant_message: brief status, e.g., "Hydrating source for artifacts.rs". tool_call: {"tool_name":"session.hydrate_source","payload":{...}}.

acquired_fact_ids: we have none yet? Maybe we can include empty array. readiness_state: "not_ready" or "evidence_visible"? Since we are about to call tool, we are not ready yet? The readiness states: not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit. Since we haven't acquired evidence yet, we are not_ready. So readiness_state: "not_ready". acquired_fact_ids: [] (empty array). assistant_message: maybe "Hydrating source for artifacts.rs to inspect fixture loading definitions". tool_call includes payload.

Make sure JSON shape: {"kind":"tool_call","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{...},"acquired_fact_ids":[],"readiness_state":"not_ready"}.

Make sure no extra fields. tool_call must be object with tool_name and payload. Use exact tool name "session.hydrate_source". Provide payload with target_selector.

Thus final JSON.
